UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST CO. N.A., AND FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CCC 2923.6, NO PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION. SEE FARNER V. COUNTRYWIDE 2009 WL 189025. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE TENDER; TO ALLEGE ALL NECESSARY ELEMENTS OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION; AND TO ALLEGE FACTS WITH SPECIFICITY WHERE APPLICABLE. BRYAN CAVE, LLP, ANDREA HICKS, MARGARET KANE THIES, AND GEORGE KELLER ARE ORDERED AGAIN TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. SEE CGC-12-525942, CGC-12-527329. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances by the moving party/ George Keller (415)675-3400 appearing for the opposing party.

Discussion held, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST CO. N.A., and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the first cause of action for violation of CCC 2923.6, no private right of action. See Farner v. Countrywide 2009 WL 189025. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to all other causes of action to allege tender; to allege all necessary elements of each cause of action; and to allege facts with specificity where applicable. Bryan Cave, LLP, Andrea Hicks, Margaret Kane Thies, and George Keller are ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. See CGC-12-525942, CGC-12-527329. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Continued To Jun-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.; RECONTRUST CO N.A. and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is
Continued to June 25, 2013. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than June 14, 2013. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Keller (415-675-3400) of Bryan Cave for Bank of America, Recontrust Company and Federal National Mortgage Association, defendants and moving parties; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY N.A., and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Opposing party failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and Court's order of January 7, 2013. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Continued To Feb-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST CO N.A. and FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - This matter will be heard on February 7, 2013 in Department 501 at 9:30am. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint and Plaintiff is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of their Response filed on December 14 to Department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date to Department 501 no later than January 8, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
